title: Salesforce Account
description: Represents an individual account, which is an organization or person involved with your business (such as customers, competitors, and partners). Accounts are one of the core objects in Salesforce Sales Cloud.

IsDeleted.description: Indicates whether the record has been moved to the Recycle Bin (true) or not (false)

MasterRecordId.description: If this record was deleted as the result of a merge, this field contains the ID of the master record

Name.description: Name of the account. Maximum 255 characters.

Type.description: Type of account, for example, Customer, Competitor, or Partner

ParentId.description: ID of the parent object, if any

BillingStreet.description: Street address for the billing address of this account

BillingCity.description: City for the billing address of this account

BillingState.description: State or province for the billing address of this account

BillingPostalCode.description: Postal code for the billing address of this account

BillingCountry.description: Country for the billing address of this account

ShippingStreet.description: Street address for the shipping address of this account

ShippingCity.description: City for the shipping address of this account

ShippingState.description: State or province for the shipping address of this account

ShippingPostalCode.description: Postal code for the shipping address of this account

ShippingCountry.description: Country for the shipping address of this account

AccountNumber.description: Account number assigned to this account (external)

Sic.description: Standard Industrial Classification code of the company's main business categorization

Industry.description: An industry associated with this account

AnnualRevenue.description: Estimated annual revenue of the account

NumberOfEmployees.description: Number of employees working at the company

TickerSymbol.description: The stock ticker symbol for this account

OwnerId.description: ID of the user who currently owns this account

CreatedDate.description: Date and time when this record was created

CreatedById.description: ID of the user who created this record

LastModifiedDate.description: Date and time when a user last modified this record

LastModifiedById.description: ID of the user who last updated this record

SystemModstamp.description: Date and time when this record was last modified by a user or automated process

LastActivityDate.description: Value is the most recent of either the due date of the most recent event or the due date of the most recently closed task

Jigsaw.description: References the ID of a company in Data.com

CleanStatus.description: Indicates the record's clean status as compared with Data.com

AccountSource.description: The source of the account record

DunsNumber.description: The Dun & Bradstreet Data Universal Numbering System (D-U-N-S) number

Tradestyle.description: A name, different from its legal name, that an org may use for conducting business

NaicsCode.description: The six-digit North American Industry Classification System (NAICS) code

NaicsDesc.description: A brief description of an organization's line of business

YearStarted.description: The year the organization was legally established

SicDesc.description: A brief description of the organization's line of business based on SIC code

OperatingHoursId.description: The operating hours associated with the account
